context_text: When I grew up, I too became a wood-chopper, and after my father died I took care of my old mother as long as she lived.
normalized_context_text: When I grew up, I too became a wood-chopper, and after my father died I took care of my old mother as long as she lived.

subject: a wood-chopper

context_text: "This at first seemed a great misfortune, for I knew a one-legged man could not do very well as a wood-chopper.
